# FLW Training Guide — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

For FLWs delivering this opportunity.

## What you are doing

For each turmeric vendor you meet, you will:

1. Take a photo of the turmeric with the yellow MTN card in the frame
2. Let the phone automatically capture your GPS location
3. Complete a short form about the vendor and their product
4. Share a short educational message with the vendor
5. Record how the vendor responded

That's one "delivery." You can do up to 20 per day, but only 5 per
market.

## Taking a good photo

- Hold the MTN card near the turmeric so both are clearly visible
- Use natural light if possible (avoid harsh shadows)
- Keep the card flat — don't bend or fold
- Make sure the full card outline is inside the photo frame

## The education message

The script is short and friendly. Do not accuse the vendor of selling
adulterated turmeric. A good framing: "We're doing a survey to learn
about turmeric quality across markets. I want to share some information
about turmeric safety that you can pass on to your customers."

Key points:
- Some turmeric contains lead, which is harmful
- Lead is sometimes added to make turmeric look brighter
- Vendors can protect customers by buying from trusted sources

If the vendor seems skeptical or hostile, it's fine to thank them and
move on. Record their response truthfully.

## If you have a problem

- Broken MTN card → ask your LLO manager for a replacement
- Vendor refuses photo → complete the form only, skip the photo (the
  delivery will be flagged but logged)
- Safety concern → leave the market, contact your LLO manager
